case_title: SIFALINE JUMA MFINANGA VS. DEVENDRA PATEL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA PATEL, DEVENDRA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SIFALINE JUMA MFINANGA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEVENDRA PATEL IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, DEVENDRA SAME CASE BROUGHT PREVIOUSLY CSM-17-855931. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MFINANGA, SIFALINE JUMA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, DEVENDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
